title: Show greeting when ELIZA_CONFIG.agentId is injected
description: Verifies the page renders a greeting containing the injected agentId when window.ELIZA_CONFIG.agentId is present.

steps.description: Verify a greeting is displayed that includes a non-empty agent identifier

title: Show dedicated error when agentId injection is missing
description: Verifies the page shows a dedicated human-readable missing-agent error state when the agentId is not injected.

steps.description: Verify an agent-id-missing error state is displayed instead of a greeting

title: Persist correct greeting after browser refresh
description: Verifies that after refreshing the page, the greeting still shows a valid agent identifier without changing to an error state.

steps.description: Verify a greeting is displayed that includes a non-empty agent identifier

title: Show error when ELIZA_CONFIG exists but agentId is empty
description: Verifies the UI shows the missing-agent error state (not an empty or undefined greeting) when ELIZA_CONFIG exists but agentId is empty.

steps.description: Verify an agent-id-missing error state is displayed instead of a greeting

title: No crash when ELIZA_CONFIG is missing entirely
description: Verifies the app loads without crashing and shows the missing-agent error state when window.ELIZA_CONFIG is absent.

steps.description: Verify the page renders an agent-id-missing error state and the UI is not blank

title: No crash when ELIZA_CONFIG is the wrong type
description: Verifies the app remains usable and shows the missing-agent error state when window.ELIZA_CONFIG is present but not an object.

steps.description: Verify the page renders an agent-id-missing error state and the UI is not blank

title: Render long/special-character agentId safely
description: Verifies that when agentId contains long and special characters, the greeting renders as plain text and remains readable without breaking layout.

steps.description: Verify a greeting is displayed and the agent identifier is rendered as text without breaking the panel layout
